reasoning: The control 3.4.2 requires establishing and enforcing security configuration settings for IT products. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to several areas: ensuring pods adhere to security standards (e.g., PodSecurityStandards), securing the API server configurations, enforcing least privilege through RBAC, and implementing network policies to restrict ingress traffic. These areas collectively ensure that security configurations are enforced across the Kubernetes environment.
title: 3_4_2: 3.4.2 Establish and enforce security configuration settings for information technology products employed in organizational systems
